title: Cobble Blocks
description: Cobblemon Lucky Block! When mining the cobble block a random pokemon spawns.
body:
**Ever wanted to play Pokemon with a lucky block twist? Now you can with Cobble Blocks! Break the Cobble Block and a random Pokemon will spawn. Anything from common Pokemon to legendaries and mythicals! Add some excitement and surpise to your adventure. Have fun and see which Pokemon you get!**



 **Crafting Recipes!**
 
![Cobble Block Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ac93a011fa1fff20dcf78de145132aad0f700c0.png)
![Master Block Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c389d803cecde8d7a09f2eccc0500e83368277aa.png)
